parsed.production_notes: The video combines human-recorded footage with an AI-generated avatar. The AI avatar exhibits typical uncanny features such as overly smooth skin, perfect static lighting, and slightly unnatural lip-syncing.

characters.appearance: Young adult female with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long brown hair. Her facial features are expressive and natural.
characters.wardrobe: In the first scene, she wears a white sleeveless turtleneck. In the second scene, she wears a light blue v-neck scrub top.

characters.appearance: Young adult female with fair skin and long red hair. She has large, expressive eyes and a perfectly smooth complexion. Her appearance is highly polished and slightly stylized.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a solid grey long-sleeved turtleneck sweater.

scenes.setting: Inside a car, daytime, muddy exterior visible.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long brown hair sits in the driver's seat of a car. She is wearing a white sleeveless turtleneck top. The car's interior features red leather seats and a dark dashboard. The driver's side window is rolled down, revealing a muddy exterior frame. She gestures animatedly with her hands as she speaks directly to the camera. Her expression is energetic and engaging. The lighting is natural daylight.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a single full-screen shot of a woman sitting in a car, talking directly to the camera. Large, bold text overlays appear on the screen, emphasizing the phrases she is saying. The text includes emojis and strike-throughs for visual impact. The camera remains static throughout the shot. The overall vibe is casual and informative.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Stop saying I'm fine, thanks. I don't know. You're welcome.
Character A says: It's very basic.
Character A says: I used to speak the same way.
Character A says: Then my friend suggested practicing with Loora.
Character A says: Let me show you.

scenes.setting: Left: plain warm background. Right: inside a car.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long red hair and fair skin is framed in a medium close-up. She is positioned against a plain, warm-toned, slightly gradient background. She wears a simple grey turtleneck sweater. Her right hand is raised, resting gently under her chin. She maintains a warm, friendly smile and looks directly forward. The lighting is soft, even, and highly polished, typical of studio or generated imagery.

A young woman with long brown hair, styled in a loose side braid, sits inside a car. She is wearing a light blue v-neck scrub top. The dark interior of the car, including the headrest and ceiling, is visible behind her. She looks directly forward with a pleasant, attentive expression. She occasionally smiles, nods, and speaks. The lighting is natural, coming from the car windows.

scenes.visual_description: The scene utilizes a vertical split-screen layout, dividing the frame equally into left and right halves. On the left is an AI-generated female avatar, and on the right is a human woman in a car. Subtitles for their conversation appear in the lower center of the screen, spanning across both halves. The text changes dynamically as they speak. At the very end of the video, a brand logo appears over the center of the screen. The camera framing for both characters remains static.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Sorry, my English is not good.
Character B says: You should practice everyday.
Character A says: But I don't have anyone to practice with.
Character B says: That's exactly what I'm here for.
Character B says: I'm Loora, your AI English tutor.
Character A says: I can speak with you?
Character B says: Yes, I'll chat with you
Character B says: give you instant feedback on your pronunciation
Character B says: and help you get better with every conversation.
Character A says: But I make a lot of mistakes.
Character B says: You don't have to worry about making mistakes
Character B says: because I'll guide you through them.
Character A says: Sounds good!
Character B says: Let's practice together every day
Character B says: and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
